p.c: function[T0, T2](x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or map[T0, T2](x0, x1) = List.nil[T2] }[Nat, Nat](List.nil[Nat], mul_mod_fn(n, a))
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> T1) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or map[T0, T1](x0, x1) = List.nil[T1] } }
function[T0, T2](x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or map[T0, T2](x0, x1) = List.nil[T2] }[Nat, Nat](List.nil[Nat], scalar_mul_fn(a))
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> T1) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or map[T0, T1](x0, x1) = List.nil[T1] } }
function[T0: lib(comm_monoid).CommMonoid] { product[T0](List.nil[T0]) = T0.1 }[Nat]
function(x0: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](x0, mul_mod_fn(n, a))).congr_mod(product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](x0, scalar_mul_fn(a))), n) = p(x0) }(List.nil[Nat])
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0 * x1, x2) = mul_mod_fn(x2, x0, x1) }(a, head, n)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0, x1).congr_mod(x0, x1) }(scalar_mul_fn(a, head), n)

goal: product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](tail, mul_mod_fn(n, a))).congr_mod(product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](tail, scalar_mul_fn(a))), n)

p.c: function(x0: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](x0, mul_mod_fn(n, a))).congr_mod(product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](x0, scalar_mul_fn(a))), n) = p(x0) }(tail)

goal: (mul_mod_fn(n, a)(head) * product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](tail, mul_mod_fn(n, a)))).congr_mod(scalar_mul_fn(a)(head) * product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](tail, scalar_mul_fn(a))), n)

p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { not x0.congr_mod(x1, x2) or not x3.congr_mod(x4, x2) or (x0 * x3).congr_mod(x1 * x4, x2) }(mul_mod_fn(n, a, head), scalar_mul_fn(a, head), n, product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](tail, mul_mod_fn(n, a))), product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](tail, scalar_mul_fn(a))))
function(x0: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](x0, mul_mod_fn(n, a))).congr_mod(product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](x0, scalar_mul_fn(a))), n) = p(x0) }(List.cons(head, tail))
not forall(x0: Nat, x1: List[Nat]) { not p(x1) or p(List.cons(x0, x1)) } or forall(x2: List[Nat]) { p(x2) } = true
exists(k0: Nat, k1: List[Nat]) { p(k1) and not p(List.cons(k0, k1)) } or forall(x0: List[Nat]) { p(x0) } = true
(forall(x0: List[Nat]) { not forall(x1: Nat, x2: List[Nat]) { not p(x2) or p(List.cons(x1, x2)) } or p(x0) })
function(x0: List[Nat]) { not forall(x1: Nat, x2: List[Nat]) { not p(x2) or p(List.cons(x1, x2)) } or p(x0) }(x)
exists(k0: Nat, k1: List[Nat]) { p(k1) and not p(List.cons(k0, k1)) } or p(x)
exists(k0: Nat, k1: List[Nat]) { p(k1) and not p(List.cons(k0, k1)) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: List[Nat]) { p(k0) and not p(List.cons(w0, k0)) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: T0, x3: List[T0]) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != List.cons[T0](x2, x3) or (x0 = x2 and x1 = x3) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: List[T0]) { x0 = x0 and x1 = x1 } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: List[T0]) { x0 = x0 } }
let w1: List[Nat] satisfy { p(w1) and not p(List.cons(w0, w1)) }
p(w1)
not p(List.cons(w0, w1))
let w2: List[Nat] satisfy { p(w2) and not p(List.cons(w0, w2)) }
p(w2)
not p(List.cons(w0, w2))
function(x0: List[Nat], x1: Nat) { not p(x0) or p(List.cons(x1, x0)) }(w2, w0)
function(x0: List[Nat]) { p(x0) }(l)
function(x0: List[Nat]) { p(x0) }(l)
function(x0: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](x0, mul_mod_fn(n, a))).congr_mod(product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](x0, scalar_mul_fn(a))), n) = p(x0) }(l)

goal: mul_mod_residues(n, a) = map[Nat, Nat](r, mul_mod_fn(n, a))

p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { map[Nat, Nat](coprime_residues(x0), mul_mod_fn(x0, x1)) = mul_mod_residues(x0, x1) }(n, a)

goal: product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](r, mul_mod_fn(n, a))).congr_mod(product[Nat](map[Nat, Nat](r, scalar_mul_fn(a))), n)

p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(pr, a.pow(r.length))
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(Nat.1, pr)
function(x0: Nat) { Nat.1 * x0 = x0 }(pr)
